2.title: Data explorer results
2.query:
timeseries response_time = avg(dt.service.request.response_time),
  by: { dt.entity.service }
| fieldsAdd service_name = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort arrayAvg(response_time) desc
| limit 20
